best-practice-synthesis-routing.reason: This DR frames a doctrine-reconciliation decision for the owner; it writes no best_practice_synthesis and assigns no value, so the model-routing rule is not exercised.

evidence-verification-gate-for-synthesis.reason: The DR cites no evidence source and asserts no synthesis claim about the built environment; the rule #10 existence/verification gate has nothing to gate here.

bias_direction: Authoring a reconciliation DR is itself governance work of exactly the kind the 2026-07-14 anti-displacement freeze warns can crowd out the judgment-heavy core; framing an unreconciled-text state as a contradiction that 'must' be resolved lends it an urgency that could rationalize further governance churn. It also lets the author of the session's overview reclassify a self-diagnosed description error (having summarized superseded doctrine) as a repo-level issue, shifting attribution off the overview and onto the documents.
independent_reviewer_counterclaim: A reviewer could argue no DR is warranted: the evidence-architecture.md:4 precedence clause already makes tier-system.md §8 govern, so the divergence is inert until evidence-architecture.md is next edited, and opening a DR manufactures work the freeze forbids. The counter is narrow but real — assess_cell.py's v_best_practice still mechanically excludes regulatory-stratum-only cells, so code and §8 already disagree at render time; whether that matters before any such cell is actually rendered is itself the open question, which this DR routes to the owner rather than deciding.
